What's a good Covenant for Pontos, I don't really know what is considered meta here. Also is the shop the really the only way to get the green bottle and the goat?
whats a vortice murphy tram?
and who does pontos work with

ok am bak

quick rundown: 
W1: very difficult, so designated borrow
W2: Not super bad but Daff has a gimmick where you lose aliemus whenever her card pops up (since you DO NOT want those effects) but in part 2 where you *have* to pick them or brick your hand you will need to burst her quickly, Pontos might have been a better pick here but harder waves ahead
W3: contender for hardest wave alongside W1, Mouchette stacks ten billion DR and seppukus herself into the boss and wins (burial grounds on your supports would help a lot)
W4: I’ll be honest at least for me this one was kind of a blur, but didn’t want to underestimate it either so just slowly reach boss and win with Caecus, it does have piercing damage that ignores shield so just do your best to heal back with Caecus
W5: hits really hard many times so Pontos is used here, save his exalt for when Pickman does his multihit, or if its not that bad in lower alerts to snipe his tradh mobs and scale up


few notes:
1. do them in this order W3>W2>W5>W4>W1 and if one can’t clear give more resources to it and try again
2. I don’t know what SR wheels you have so assuming you have all the gacha SRs, Pontos event wheel and Ham event wheel. Gateway too because if you don’t have it **GET IT**
3. Will not attempt to guess what covenants you have raised, this bit you do yourself
4. dunno what posses you have so assume you have most chapter posses+Festival of Tides which if you don’t have **GET IT**
5. Mileage may vary, yeah uh <:Jenkin_idk:1356084138280489080> I’m far from perfect and while this may work on paper might not in practice
6. I likely goofed up and repeated something. give me a call and I will fix it
7. This rotation is also just overall kinda difficult, so no pressure if its hard

meds good if no one else wants it

Twins is good if E3+

beyond that just run whatever filler cov you want

upcoming rerun will be 3 really good limited dps, still rec to get one copy of each at least
atm:
- one copy of Murphy and Clem, priority Clem more as Murphy can spook you in standard banner (blue color) and Hameln in yellow
- Helot Catena or Ghelot is rerun in the next 9 days or so, she can spook u in standard banner (red), 
- Corposant sadly wants like 3-4 copies (e2 or e3) in order to run well, she can spearfishing well in arc2 ruleset (any stage with Astral Reign mark) but arc1 is a bit iffy to her
- Pollux is the arc2 angri bird dps, he also wants like 3-4 copies for more completed powah
- Pontos e0 (1 copy) is fine
- tho in your account progression, getting one copy is good enough
